# Manual Runbook: Build-Off 001 Todo Auth

Use this runbook for adapters marked `mode: "manual"`.

1. Open the target tool in a clean workspace.
2. Paste the full contents of `briefs/001-todo-auth.md`.
3. Start timing when the prompt is submitted.
4. Stop "time to first preview" when a rendered preview is visible.
5. Export or copy the produced repository into `artifacts/<run-id>/<tool>/repo/`.
6. Capture a screenshot into `artifacts/<run-id>/<tool>/preview.png`.
7. Record any available token or cost data exactly as shown by the tool.
8. Do not estimate missing values. Leave them null and explain the gap in `notes`.
